eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN IMMEDIATE EVACUATION NOTICE for the following counties or areas: Beaver, OK; at 09:45 AM ON FEB 19, 2026 Effective until 11:45 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
At 10:30 PM, a large and destructive wildfire was burning out of control SE of Boyd spreading rapidly South. Wildfires can damage or destroy structures and can harm or kill people and animals. For your safety EVACUATE IMMEDIATELY for Turpin Methodist Church. Those between Balko and Bryan's Corner should LEAVE this area NOW to avoid injury or death. Do not delay to pack belongings. Reunification Center is setting up at Turpin Methodist Church.
Roads in the area may be impacted by fire and smoke. Never drive into heavy smoke. SLOW DOWN & MOVE OVER for emergency vehicles.
